---
title: "Home"
---

## Machine Learning – Fundamentals for Non-techies

- [Neural Networks](ml-fundamentals/chapters/neural_networks.qmd)
- [Vectors](ml-fundamentals/chapters/vectors.qmd)

---

## Machine Learning – Learn through Coding

- [Python Setup](ml-coding/chapters/00-setup.ipynb)
- [Regression](ml-coding/chapters/01-regression.ipynb)
- [Vectors](ml-coding/chapters/02-vectors.ipynb)
- [Classification 01](ml-coding/chapters/03-classification.ipynb)
- [Classification 02](ml-coding/chapters/04-classification-02.ipynb)

---

## My Projects

- [Article](ml-projects/chapters/article.qmd)
-->
